subject: AP United States Government and Politics
notes: This package combines verified local/historical College Board practice or released packages.
2012 item 46 is excluded from the published scored MCQ pool because the official key says it was not used in scoring.
2020 is included as a normal Practice Exam package after two-column extraction, visual attachment, and duplicate checks.
2009 remains candidate-only until its two-column/visual extraction issues pass production gates.
Current AP Central exam structures should be tracked separately from historical/local practice exams.

unit_classification_authority.official_framework: AP U.S. Government and Politics Course and Exam Description
unit_classification_authority.policy: Official exam and subject framework materials are the only authority for unit classification.
unit_classification_authority.student_progression_rule: A question belongs to the earliest unit after which a student can answer it using that unit and prior units only.
